_meta.purpose: Scheme-fit taxonomy, post-FA roster-room scores, and trade mechanics for 2026 NFL Draft agent simulation

coverage.pillar3_trade_mechanics: charts 1-32 + tendencies for all 32 + 2026 comp picks

_meta.rules: Every fact cites a URL. Post-free-agency April 2026 snapshot. No analyst mocks referenced.

oc_scheme.base_concept: Drew Petzing wide-zone/duo hybrid with heavy 12 personnel and designed QB movement
oc_scheme.rb_archetype: one-cut zone back with power-gap flex, ability to hit duo crease
oc_scheme.wr_archetype: vertical X + separator Z, Harrison Jr. drives contested-catch design but slot/YAC still needed
oc_scheme.ol_archetype: athletic zone blockers, mobile center, tackles who can climb
oc_scheme.te_archetype: dual-threat Y, inline block + seam stretch (Trey McBride model)
oc_scheme.qb_archetype: movement/RPO QB (Kyler) — boot, sprint-out, off-platform arm talent

dc_scheme.base_concept: Nick Rallis 3-4 hybrid with Fangio-influence 2-high shells, late rotation
dc_scheme.edge_archetype: convertible 3-4 OLB / 4-3 DE, 255-265 lb, bend + power
dc_scheme.lb_archetype: stack LB with coverage range, communicator MIKE
dc_scheme.s_archetype: two-high capable safeties, versatile robber/post (Budda Baker template)

oc_scheme.base_concept: Zac Robinson McVay-tree outside-zone with heavy play-action and condensed splits
oc_scheme.rb_archetype: decisive one-cut back who can press the line (Bijan role)
oc_scheme.wr_archetype: route-tree separators, deep Z, contested X, YAC slot
oc_scheme.ol_archetype: wide-zone OL, athletic OT, mobile guards
oc_scheme.te_archetype: move Y (Kyle Pitts flex) + in-line blocker
oc_scheme.qb_archetype: rhythm passer with play-action boot chops (Penix Jr. skillset)

dc_scheme.base_concept: Jeff Ulbrich aggressive 4-3 under with Seahawks/Jets simulated pressures
dc_scheme.cb_archetype: press-man and Cover-3 hybrid boundary CB
dc_scheme.s_archetype: deep half + box hybrid, box-safety/nickel convertibility

oc_scheme.base_concept: Todd Monken gap/power + heavy RPO + designed QB run, widest personnel variety in NFL
oc_scheme.rb_archetype: physical downhill back with receiving chops (Henry/Hill split)
oc_scheme.wr_archetype: big-body X contested winner + vertical Z, slot with YAC
oc_scheme.ol_archetype: people-movers, gap-power OL, athletic C for climb blocks
oc_scheme.te_archetype: Y inline POA blocker plus receiving move-TE (Andrews/Likely)
oc_scheme.qb_archetype: dual-threat, Lamar-specific — arm talent + elite mobility

dc_scheme.base_concept: Zach Orr 3-4 / Wink-legacy disguised coverage with heavy simulated pressure

dc_scheme.cb_archetype: long zone-match CBs, ball production priority

oc_scheme.base_concept: Joe Brady spread/pistol, quick-game plus designed Allen runs and shot plays

oc_scheme.qb_archetype: Josh Allen — arm + legs. Backup needs mobility to run offense

dc_scheme.base_concept: Bobby Babich (McDermott tree) Cover-2/Tampa-2 with disguise
dc_scheme.lb_archetype: rangy Tampa-2 MIKE/WILL with hook-curl range

oc_scheme.base_concept: Dave Canales outside-zone / condensed-splits / middle-of-field bootleg (Shanahan-adjacent via Pete Carroll)

pillar2_roster_composition._scale_note: 1 = no need (stacked), 3 = depth need, 5 = critical starter need. Post-2025 FA snapshot April 2026.

ARI.notes: Added Josh Sweat FA but still need bender opposite. Interior aging (Campbell 40, Tomlinson 32). Harrison/McBride/Conner skill stacked. LT Beachum retirement-age.

ATL.notes: Edge remains weakest pass rush in NFL despite drafting Pearce/Walker '25. Bijan/Penix/Pitts elite skill. Matthews aging at LT. Cousins cap situation unresolved.

BAL.notes: Humphrey aging, Wiggins unproven, Awuzie departed — CB biggest room. WR2 opposite Flowers still unresolved. Stanley/Faalele tackle uncertainty.

BUF.notes: Post-Diggs/Davis WR room still thin — Coleman unproven as #1. CB aging (Benford core) with Rasul Douglas departed. Deep need at CB2 and vertical WR.

CAR.notes: Brooks/Legette/XL Coker recent investments but WR1 X still open. Defense rebuilt but thin top-end. Safety hole persists after Chinn departure.

CHI.notes: Jackson/Thuney/Dalman FA overhaul of IOL. Tackle spots (Wright/Jones) remain biggest hole. Edge depth behind Sweat thin. WR stacked (Moore/Odunze/Burden).

CIN.notes: Tee Higgins retained — WR2 solved but depth thin. IOL chronic (Volson/Karras/Cappa). Interior DL biggest need with BJ Hill aging and Reader gone.

CLE.notes: Watson injury + Flacco/Pickett stopgaps = QB is CRITICAL need. Bitonio/Teller IOL aging. WR room rebuilt around Jeudy but X unresolved.

DAL.notes: Added Kenny Clark in FA, still need pass-rush interior. IOL is Tyler Booker + rookie competition. Pickens/Lamb WR combo solved. LB Overshown/DeMarvion Overshown injury concerns.

DEN.notes: Surtain/Moss/McMillian loaded secondary. RB room post-Williams thin — biggest skill need. WR1 post-Sutton question. LB after Greenlaw injury.

DET.notes: Hutchinson return + Za'Darius Smith FA help edge. IOL after Glasgow aging. CB2 opposite Arnold remains weakness (Davis/Rakestraw). WR stacked.

GB.notes: Alexander departed — CB biggest need behind Nixon/Hobbs. WR1 X still unresolved. Bakhtiari replacement at LT uncertain (Walker/Morgan).

HOU.notes: OT is CRITICAL — Tunsil traded to WAS, Howard unproven at LT. IOL also rebuilt in FA (Scruggs/Robinson). Stroud protection is the entire draft narrative.

IND.notes: Richardson/Jones QB unsettled. Safety room biggest hole post-Moore/Cross. DeForest Buckner anchors DL. WR1 X question (Pittman aging, Downs slot).

JAX.notes: Interior DL post-Allen departure. CB rebuilt (Campbell, Lloyd) but still thin. Coen new HC drives scheme fit overhaul. Hunter pick (either WR or CB) complicates boards.

KC.notes: LT remains unsolved (Taylor/Suamataia) — multi-year hole. WR1 opposite Worthy/Rice unresolved (Hollywood Brown injury). Jones/Nnadi aging interior.

LV.notes: Geno Smith acquired; Bowers/Meyers stacked skill. CB room thin post-Hobbs departure. Interior DL aging. Jeanty fit with Chip Kelly scheme.

LAC.notes: McConkey elite slot but X/Z questions (Palmer departed, Johnston unproven). TE room thin (Dissly aging). Interior DL after Mack/Bosa edge secure.

LAR.notes: Stafford aging — post-Kupp WR need X. Verse/Young/Turner edge loaded. Interior OL (Jackson/Dotson) question. Stafford succession the hidden QB story.

MIA.notes: Wilkins/Davis/Hand departed — interior DL is CRITICAL. IOL remains chronic weakness. Tua injury history raises QB2 need. Hill aging at WR.

MIN.notes: Murphy/Rodgers CB thin post-Griffin. Hargrave/Allen interior strong but depth. Darrisaw/O'Neill tackles solid. Slot CB (Bynum depart) biggest hole.

NE.notes: Diggs/Hollins/Henry FA fills skill. OT is existential — Campbell LT + RT black hole. IOL still thin. Maye protection drives entire draft.

NO.notes: Carr aging/injury — Rattler/Haener unproven. Mathieu retired — safety critical. Jordan aging at edge. Full rebuild mode w/ Staley/Moore staff.

NYG.notes: Wilson/Dart QB question. Nabers/Slayton WR solid. IOL chronic (Van Roten/Runyan). Safety post-McKinney unresolved. Edge loaded (Burns/Thibodeaux/Carter).

NYJ.notes: Fields/Taylor QB uncertainty. TE is critical (no starter-caliber). Adams traded, Davis aging — safety need. Wilson WR1 solid, Reynolds #2 bridge.

PHI.notes: Roster stacked everywhere post-Super Bowl. Edge behind Smith/Hunt post-Graham retirement. Interior OL Kelce/Dickerson/Mailata elite. Mukuba/Blankenship solidified S.

PIT.notes: Rodgers 1-year bridge — QB of future need. WR post-Pickens trade thin (Metcalf FA added). Ramsey/Porter CB loaded. Watt/Highsmith edge elite.

SF.notes: Aiyuk trade pending, Samuel traded to WAS — WR thin behind Pearsall/Jennings. Interior DL post-Hargrave/Armstead rebuild. CB after Ward departure critical. IOL question.

SEA.notes: IOL is the worst room in NFL (Lucas hurt, Haynes/Hayes thin). OT also shaky. Metcalf trade creates WR reshuffle. Darnold bridge-QB. Jones/Murphy interior DL solid.

TB.notes: Edge post-YGM/Gholston thin. LB David aging. Evans/Godwin/McMillan WR stacked. Wirfs elite LT. Mayfield extension secures QB short-term.

TEN.notes: QB is existential (#1 overall candidate) — Levis/Rudolph insufficient. Zeitler/Lloyd IOL overhaul. Sweat/Simmons DL anchors. WR thin behind Ridley.

WAS.notes: Tunsil trade fixed LT. Samuel trade fills WR2. Interior DL post-Payne aging critical. Daniels is franchise QB. Lattimore CB1 solid.

ARI.profile: Monti Ossenfort conservative — prefers to accumulate picks and stay put

ATL.profile: Terry Fontenot moderate; active in day-2 moves

BAL.historical_freq: 6 of 8 drafts include at least one move (mostly trade-DOWN)
BAL.profile: Eric DeCosta / Ozzie tree — accumulator, most frequent trade-down team in NFL
BAL.willing_to_give: rarely trades up for premium — philosophical down-mover

BUF.profile: Brandon Beane moderate aggression, willing to pay for specific targets

CAR.historical_freq: 3 of 8 — Bryce Young 2023 massive up (huge package to CHI)
CAR.profile: Post-Fitterer Dan Morgan still unproven tendencies
CAR.willing_to_give: hesitant after Young cost; likely stands pat

CHI.historical_freq: 3 of 8 (Fields 2021 up, Odunze 2024 stay); frequent trade-DOWN role
CHI.profile: Ryan Poles accumulator — beneficiary of CAR/NYJ overpay

CIN.profile: Duke Tobin / Mike Brown historically cheapest franchise on trade premiums
CIN.willing_to_give: almost never moves up; occasional day-3 swaps

CLE.profile: Andrew Berry aggressive (Watson 2022 precedent) — now capped by missing 1sts
CLE.willing_to_give: 2026 has limited ammo post-Watson; day-2 swaps only

DAL.profile: Jerry Jones historically talks but rarely executes

DEN.historical_freq: 5 of 8 — most aggressive era (Bo Nix ascension 2024)
DEN.profile: Paton/Payton will trade up for specific QB/playmaker targets
DEN.willing_to_give: future 1sts on table for top-10 QB; less for other positions

DET.profile: Brad Holmes tactical — will leap for conviction picks

GB.profile: Brian Gutekunst strategic — up-for-value, not positional reach
GB.willing_to_give: day-2 pick swaps, almost never future 1sts

HOU.historical_freq: 5 of 8 since Caserio era began — famously active (Stroud + Anderson 2023)
HOU.profile: Nick Caserio Belichick-tree, most active trade GM in NFL
HOU.willing_to_give: future-1sts + packages; reputation precedes all talks

IND.profile: Chris Ballard hyper-conservative — won't move future 1sts

JAX.historical_freq: 4 of 8 including Hunter '25 massive leap (from 5 to 2)
JAX.profile: New GM James Gladstone unproven but Hunter trade shows willingness
JAX.willing_to_give: already moved 2026 #1 in Hunter package — ammo depleted

KC.historical_freq: 6 of 8 — most aggressive top-5 leapers (Mahomes 2017, Worthy 2024)
KC.profile: Brett Veach trades up more than almost any GM, especially for WR/OL
KC.willing_to_give: 1st + 3rd next-year for top-5 range; proven pattern

LV.profile: New regime — Tom Telesco conservative historically (Chargers)
LV.willing_to_give: modest moves, reluctant on future picks

LAC.historical_freq: 2 of 8 — Hortiz first draft 2024 (stayed put at 5)

LAR.historical_freq: 4 of 8 — famous 'f*** them picks' Snead era
LAR.profile: Les Snead trades draft capital for veterans more than picks; draft-day moves less frequent now

MIA.profile: Chris Grier front-loaded veteran trades, now capped on draft capital

MIN.historical_freq: 4 of 8 — JJ McCarthy 2024 up-move, Turner '24 trade-back to up
MIN.profile: Kwesi Adofo-Mensah Harvard/analytics tree but willing to attack
MIN.willing_to_give: analytical — only when chart math favors; medium aggression

NE.historical_freq: 5 of 8 historically — Belichick trade-DOWN signature, now Eliot Wolf era
NE.profile: Post-Belichick Wolf unproven; bias toward down-moves continues

NO.profile: Mickey Loomis mortgages future, not present — 2026 ammo weak

NYG.historical_freq: 4 of 8 — Jaxson Dart '25 pattern shows readiness
NYG.profile: Joe Schoen willing to leap for QB specifically

NYJ.historical_freq: 4 of 8 — Wilson 2021 stay, Sauce 2022 stay, Hall '22 up
NYJ.willing_to_give: moderate — will move for specific conviction picks

PHI.historical_freq: 7 of 8 drafts include at least one move (mix up/down)
PHI.profile: Howie Roseman MOST ACTIVE trader in NFL — always moving picks
PHI.willing_to_give: any combination — Roseman always finds a deal

PIT.profile: Omar Khan era slightly more active than Colbert, but still conservative

SF.historical_freq: 5 of 8 — Trey Lance 2021 megatrade, Trent Williams acquisition style
SF.profile: John Lynch willing to package for specific Shanahan targets
SF.willing_to_give: future-1sts for QB ascension historically; current cap/cap complicates

SEA.historical_freq: 4 of 8 — John Schneider trade-DOWN signature, occasional up-moves
SEA.profile: Schneider MOST FREQUENT trade-DOWN GM in NFL (BAL rivals)
SEA.willing_to_give: rare on up-moves; famously courts calls to move back

TB.profile: Licht stays put, occasional day-3 moves

TEN.profile: Titans holding #1 overall in 2026 — primary trade-DOWN candidate
TEN.willing_to_give: from #1 they are the market-maker, not giver

WAS.historical_freq: 4 of 8 — Adam Peters 2024 first draft moved around
WAS.willing_to_give: willing on value-based leaps, avoids overpay

2026_comp_picks._note: Comp picks projected and officially awarded by NFL via OTC cancelled-comp formula. Snapshot April 2026 post-award.

teams_with_extra_2026_1sts: CAR (originally owed to CHI, already conveyed)
JAX (traded 2026 1st in Hunter package to CLE)
2026_trade_currency_notes.qb_driven_upward_pressure: Only 2-3 legitimate 1st-round QBs in 2026 class — TEN (#1) is lone consensus lock; if a team wants #2-caliber QB early, up-moves to TEN or 2nd pick carry extreme premium
